mapper.select: SELECT sai.sku_id, p.title, p.cover_url, s.price AS origin_price, sai.seckill_price, sai.limit_per_user FROM seckill_activity_item sai LEFT JOIN sku s ON sai.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE sai.activity_id = #{activityId}

SELECT sai.sku_id, p.title, p.cover_url, s.price AS origin_price, sai.seckill_price, sai.limit_per_user FROM seckill_activity_item sai LEFT JOIN sku s ON sai.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE sai.activity_id = #{activityId} AND sai.sku_id = #{skuId}
